groups.question_title: Which TWO points do the students most frequently make about their music background before entering music schools?

list.title: C
list.content: they played more than one instrument

groups.question_title: Which TWO points do the students most frequently make about their music practice?

list.title: D
list.content: they did not have enough practice

list.title: E
list.content: they enjoyed the challenge of playing complex pieces

groups.question_title: Which TWO points do the students most frequently make about playing pieces that would be assessed?

list.title: A
list.content: they liked to hear others playing the same piece

list.title: B
list.content: they wanted to play unknown pieces

list.title: C
list.content: they played a piece by memory

list.title: D
list.content: they played a piece selected by the tutor

groups.question_title: What comment do the students make about the following practice?
groups.desc:
Questions 27-30
What comment do the students make about the following practice?
Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-G, next to Questions 27-30.

list.title: B
list.content: it is challenging but also enjoyable

list.title: F
list.content: need to work effectively with others
